name: Anatomy & Physiology
desc: Demonstrate knowledge of the anatomy and physiology of the human muscular, skeletal, and integumentary systems.

name: Designer Genes
desc: Solve problems related to molecular genetics, gene expression, mutations, CRISPR, and modern biotechnology.

name: Disease Detectives
desc: Apply epidemiological principles to investigate disease outbreaks, environmental hazards, and public health scenarios.

name: Entomology
desc: Identify and answer questions about insects from designated orders — taxonomy, morphology, ecology, and economic importance.

name: Water Quality
desc: Identify macroinvertebrates and complete tasks relating to freshwater ecosystem health, pollution, and water chemistry.

name: Astronomy
desc: Demonstrate knowledge of stellar evolution, variable stars, the H-R diagram, binary systems, and extragalactic objects.

name: Dynamic Planet
desc: Explore Earth's glaciers — glacial processes, ice cores, glacial landforms, sea level change, and climate implications.

name: Remote Sensing
desc: Analyze satellite and aerial imagery to interpret land cover, atmospheric conditions, and surface processes on Earth.

name: Rocks & Minerals
desc: Identify rocks and minerals using physical properties, interpret formation environments, and analyze geologic cross-sections.

name: Chemistry Lab
desc: Complete lab tasks and questions on physical/chemical properties, stoichiometry, equilibrium, and thermodynamics.

name: Circuit Lab
desc: Build and analyze DC circuits covering Ohm's Law, Kirchhoff's Laws, capacitors, inductors, and RC circuits.

name: Forensics
desc: Identify polymers, analyze chromatography, and solve forensic chemistry problems using analytical techniques.

name: Hovercraft
desc: Pre-build a hovercraft with one lift motor and one thrust motor that navigates a course with maximum precision.

name: Machines
desc: Answer questions and complete tasks on simple machines, mechanical advantage, work, power, and classical mechanics.

name: Materials Science
desc: Identify materials and complete tasks on structure-property relationships, composites, ceramics, polymers, and metals.

name: Boomilever
desc: Design and build a cantilevered structure scored on structural efficiency — ratio of load held to structural mass.

name: Electric Vehicle
desc: Pre-build an electric vehicle powered by a single battery that travels a target distance as precisely as possible.

name: Helicopter
desc: Build a rubber-band-powered helicopter achieving maximum flight time. Scored on hang time and launch precision.

name: Robot Tour
desc: Program an autonomous robot to navigate a course stopping at designated targets as precisely as possible.

name: Bungee Drop
desc: Construct a bungee cord system that drops a mass from a height, bringing it as close to the ground as possible without touching.

name: Codebusters
desc: Encrypt and decrypt messages using classical and modern ciphers: Caesar, Vigenère, Playfair, Baconian, and RSA.

name: Engineering CAD
desc: Use Onshape CAD software to create 2D drawings and parametric 3D solid models from engineering specifications.

name: Experimental Design
desc: Design, conduct, and report an experiment in real-time using the scientific method, data analysis, and statistical reasoning.
